insight: You're starting from a blank slate, which means you have the unique opportunity to create a learning journey tailored to your strengths and goals, and to see immediate improvements with each passing day. By committing to just one session today, you'll not only break the 0-session streak but also take a crucial first step towards developing a consistent learning habit that will yield tangible progress in the days to come.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
